title: kali paulsenii
intro: Kali paulsenii, also known as the 'Kali musk', is a type of medicinal plant native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Kali paulsenii include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating skin conditions and wounds. Kali paulsenii is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and can also be used in the form of a powder or oil for topical applications.
